content_of_post_to_comment: I don’t want to read about their heterosexual problems or how much they struggle with basic things or how much they hate everyone and everything sucks. Life’s not so bad. Can everyone cheer up a little
comment: I get the fatigue with constant doomposting, but sometimes people use spaces like this specifically because they can complain about things they can’t really vent about elsewhere. The tricky part is that what feels like a basic problem to one person can be genuinely overwhelming to someone else. A little less misery and a little more perspective would be nice though.
